description: Accounting of the qodesh. Probably written by Shelomo b. Shemuʾel b. Saʿadya ha-Levi (identification by Amir Ashur). Dated: Sivan 1558 Seleucid = May/June 1247 CE. The recto lists revenue from rent, and the verso lists expenditures made during the same period. (Information in part from Gil, Documents, pp.471 #142)
tags: Coptic numerals, account, waqf, 13th c, heqdesh, qodesh
description_he: חשבון הקדש, סיון 1558 לשטרות (מאי-יוני 1247). פנים: הכנסות שכירות. גב: הוצאות לאותה תקופה.
